data.title: Trump says his people will meet with Chinese officials on June 9 to discuss trade deal
data.description:
President Donald Trump confirmed on Friday that three of his top officials will meet with Chinese government representatives in London on June 9 to continue discussions on a possible trade deal. The update came in a short post from the president on Truth Social, where he wrote, “The meeting should go very well. Thank you […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-chinese-officials-to-talk-trade-deal/

data.title: Crypto fund issuers press SEC to reinstate ‘first-to-file’ ETF approval process
data.description:
Crypto fund issuers urged the SEC to go back to an approach that allowed ETPs to be approved on a first-come first first-served basis
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/357341/crypto-fund-issuers-press-sec-to-reinstate-first-to-file-etf-approval-process?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Switzerland to Swap Crypto Holder Data with 74 Countries Under the OECD’s CARF
data.description:
Switzerland has approved automatic crypto-asset data exchange with 74 jurisdictions under OECD’s CARF. It includes EU countries and most G20 members but excludes the United States and Saudi Arabia. Data sharing begins in 2027 if partner states meet reciprocity and compliance standards
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/switzerland-to-swap-crypto-holder-data-with-74-countries-under-the-oecds-carf/

data.title: ‘Crunch Time’: Crypto Trader Justin Bennett Outlines Two Possible Scenarios for Bitcoin After BTC Bounces From Major Support Level
data.description:
A widely followed crypto analyst is outlining two possible routes Bitcoin (BTC) could take after bouncing off a major support level.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/06/crunch-time-crypto-trader-justin-bennett-outlines-two-possible-scenarios-for-bitcoin-after-btc-bounces-from-major-support-level/

data.title: Czech finance minister rejects resignation calls amid raging crypto donation scandal
data.description:
Czech Republic’s Minister of Finance, Zbyněk Stanjura, has refused to resign in response to calls from the opposition to share responsibility over a controversial Bitcoin donation that already cost his colleague Pavel Blažek the post of Minister of Justice. A parliamentary session devoted to the politically damaging incident was adjourned without completing the debate. Opponents […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/czech-finance-minister-rejects-resignation-calls-amid-raging-crypto-donation-scandal/

data.title: Bond buyers’ shocking strike leaves BlackRock struggling
data.description:
Big funds ditch 20-year bonds, yields hit 2008 highs as BlackRock and peers shun long debt, nudging some toward Bitcoin hedges.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/bond-buyers-shocking-strike-leaves-blackrock-struggling

data.title: Singapore Clarifies Digital Token Licensing for Overseas Providers
data.description:
Singapore sets new licensing standards for overseas crypto providers starting June 2025.
source: https://coincu.com/341942-singapore-digital-token-licensing-2025

data.title: Polymarket Becomes the Official Prediction Market Partner of xAI and X
data.description:
The predictions markets platform has announced a partnership with Elon Musk’s AI firm xAI.
source: https://www.nftgators.com/polymarket-becomes-the-official-prediction-market-partner-of-xai-and-x/

data.title: Crypto market structure hearing devolves into partisan claims
data.description:
Allegations on the president’s ties to the crypto industry and claims of “Trump derangement syndrome” clouded attempts to reach an agreement on a market structure bill in Congress.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/market-structure-hearing-criticism-donald-trump?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Trump Says Fed Should Cut Rates By One Percentage Point
data.description:
Catenaa, Friday, June 06, 2025- US President Donald Trump on Friday urged Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell to cut interest rates by a full percentage point to boost the economy. “Europe has had 10 rate cuts, we have had none. Despite (Powell), our Country is doing great. Go for a full point,” Trump wrote in […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/trump-says-fed-should-cut-rates-by-one-percentage-point

data.title: Congressman Thomas Massie introduces bill to audit US gold reserves
data.description:
Today, four members of Congress, led by Thomas Massie, have introduced a bill to initiate the first comprehensive audit of America’s gold reserves. The Gold Reserve Transparency Act (H. R. 3795) requires a full assay, inventory, and audit of all United States gold holdings for decades. The four congress members are Reps. Thomas Massie, Troy Nehls, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/massie-new-bill-to-audit-us-gold-reserves/

data.title: Elon Musk’s X, Apple & Google in Early Talks to Integrate Stablecoins: Report
data.description:
This week, Fortune reported that Apple, Elon Musk’s X (formerly Twitter), Airbnb, and Google have held initial discussions with crypto firms to embed stablecoins into their payment systems. Stablecoins are on track to reshape digital payments. In 2024, venture capital poured over $1. 5 billion into stablecoin startups, up 80 percent from the prior year
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/06/elon-musks-x-apple-google-in-early-talks-to-integrate-stablecoins-report/

data.title: Markets recover on jobs surprise amid political feud tensions
data.description:
President Trump’s feud with Elon Musk took a backseat as investors digested a better-than-expected labor report
source: https://blockworks.co/news/markets-recover-jobs-report-feud-musk-trump

data.title: Why Are Crypto Prices Down Today?
data.description:
Crypto prices plunged sharply today. Bitcoin fell to $102,836, down 1. 86% in early trading hours. Bitcoin price tanked from $105,000 to below $102,000, Ethereum tumbled 6
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/06/why-are-crypto-prices-down-today/

data.title: Crypto Firm Gemini Files Confidentially for IPO in the US – Here’s What We Know
data.description:
Gemini has confidentially lodged a draft S-1 with the SEC, confirming intentions to list shares on public markets. The IPO is expected once regulators finish their review and market conditions allow, coming a day after stable-coin issuer Circle began trading on the NYSE following its own approval.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/gemini-confidential-ipo-filing-us/

data.title: 210,000 BTC By 2027: Metaplanet Unveils $5.4 Billion Capital Raise To Boost Bitcoin Treasury
data.description:
Metaplanet, the Tokyo-listed firm now positioning itself as a Bitcoin Treasury Company, has launched a $5. 4 billion equity raise to buy more BTC, continuing its plan to build one of the world’s largest corporate Bitcoin stashes. “555 Million Plan” On June 6, Metaplanet announced that it would raise $5. 4 billion through the issuance of 555 million […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/210000-btc-by-2027-metaplanet-unveils-5-4-billion-capital-raise-to-boost-bitcoin-treasury/

data.title: Litecoin Wobbles Under Pressure: Can It Find Footing Below $87?
data.description:
Grayhoood, a crypto trader, said on X that Litecoin is currently experiencing a bearish trend, emphasizing the ongoing weakness in price action. Over the past 24 hours, LTC has decreased by 2. 8%, and the candlestick charts reflect a noticeable downward movement. As shown in the chart he referenced, LTC started the day around $89
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/litecoin/litecoin-wobbles-under-pressure/

data.title: Extreme Fear Sets In as Bitcoin Funding Rates Turn Negative Again
data.description:
Despite Bitcoin maintaining its footing above $100,000, sentiment in the derivatives market has shifted sharply.
source: https://coindoo.com/market/extreme-fear-sets-in-as-bitcoin-funding-rates-turn-negative-again/

data.title: Trump demands full percentage point rate cut from Federal Reserve
data.description:
President Donald Trump is demanding that the Federal Reserve slash interest rates by a full percentage point, even as fresh government data shows the labor market is holding up better than expected. Following the release of May’s jobs report earlier today, Trump posted on Truth Social, writing, “Go for a full point, Rocket Fuel!” The […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-demands-1-percent-rate-cut-from-fed/
